extraction_notes: Extracted from 163-page schematic PNGs. M2 Pro/Max variant. Austringer VR, CLVR instances, Cobra HDMI, Carlow B0 audio, Eos SE, Willamette WiFi.

ics.description: Main SoC. Pro has 10/12-core CPU + 16/19-core GPU. Max has 12-core CPU + 30/38-core GPU.

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator (42A design)
ics.description: 42A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. 3 Iceman gate driver phases. Output: PP3V8_AON (3.8V). Enable: P3V8AON_PWR_EN. Fault: P3V8AON_FAULT_L.

Slave PMU. Buck outputs per page 146: BUCK0 (PPVDD_DCS_S1, PD#17), BUCK1 (PPVDDQ0_S1, PD#13), BUCK2 (PPVDD_ECPU_SRAM_AWAKESW, PD#2), BUCK3 (PP1V8_S2, PD#19), BUCK4 (PPVDD2H0_S2SW, PD#14), BUCK5 (PPVDD_SOC_S1, PD#11), BUCK6 (PPVDD_CIO_S2SW, PD#16), BUCK7 (PPVDD_DISP2_AWAKESW — not used on S designs, PD#15), BUCK8 (PP1V2_AWAKE, PD#12), BUCK9 (PPVDD_AMPH0_S2SW, PD#21), BUCK10 (PPVDD_ECPU_AWAKESW, PD#0). LDOs: LDO0 (PPVDD_LOW_S2), LDO1V8 (PP1V8_AWAKE internal), LDO1V2 (PP1V2_AWAKE internal). SW0 (PP1V8_AWAKE).

Master PMU. Buck outputs per page 145: BUCK0 (PPVDD_SRAM_S1, PD#7), BUCK1 (PPVDD_GPU_BMPR_S1, PD#1), BUCK2 (unused), BUCK3 (PP1V8_S2SW, PD#3), BUCK4 (PPVDD2H1_S2SW, PD#4), BUCK5 (PPVDD_DISP_AWAKESW, PD#20), BUCK6 (PPVDD_AMPH1_S2SW, PD#6), BUCK7 (PPVDD_AVEMSR_AWAKESW, PD#5), BUCK8 (PP1V2_S2, PD#8), BUCK9 (PPVDD_FIXED_S1, PD#9), BUCK10 (PPVDDQ1_S1, PD#10). LDOs: LDO0 (PP3V3_S2), LDO1 (PP1V8_S2SW_CLVR_VDDC1), LDO4 (PP3V3_AON), LDO5 (PP0V8_S2_CLVR_VDDDIG). LDO1V8 (PP1V8_AON), LDO1V2 (PP1V2_AON). SW0 (PP1V2_S2_CLVR_VDDIO).

Multi-phase voltage regulator controller producing PP1V8_S1_CLVR_VDDH which feeds all 5 CLVR instances. 5-phase design with Iceman gate driver support. Enable: P1V8VDDH_PW_EN_R. Fault: P1V8VDDH_FAULT_L. DrMOS fault: P1V8VDDH_DRMOS_FAULT_L. SPMI debug interface via NUB. Input: PPVIN_P1V8VDDH + PP5V_S2_MAIN.

ics.function: CLVR VR — PCPU power (all 4 bucks: PCPU0/1 + PCPU_SRAM0/1)
ics.description: MIRABEAU FCCSP. CFG = D (12+2+12+2). Buck0/HP0 (PPVDD_PCPU1_AWAKESW), Buck1/LP0 (PPVDD_PCPU_SRAM1_AWAKESW), Buck2/HP1 (PPVDD_PCPU0_AWAKESW), Buck3/LP1 (PPVDD_PCPU_SRAM0_AWAKESW). OTP = MP. Buck2/HP1 and Buck3/LP1 are Max-only.
CFG = A (13+1+13+1). Buck0/HP0 (PPVDD_GPU2_AWAKESW), Buck1/LP0 (PPVDD_GPU_SRAM2_AWAKESW), Buck2/HP1 (PPVDD_GPU1_AWAKESW), Buck3/LP1 (PPVDD_GPU_SRAM1_AWAKESW). OTP = AP.

ics.function: CLVR VR — GPU cluster 0/3 power (Max only)
ics.description: CFG = A (13+1+13+1). Buck0/HP0 (PPVDD_GPU0_AWAKESW), Buck1/LP0 (PPVDD_GPU_SRAM0_AWAKESW), Buck2/HP1 (PPVDD_GPU3_AWAKESW), Buck3/LP1 (PPVDD_GPU_SRAM3_AWAKESW). Only populated on Max. OTP = AP.
CFG = E (4+0+24+0). Buck0/HP0 unused on C platforms (NC_M3_BUCK0_FB). Buck2/HP1 (PPVDD_FABRIC_S1). OTP = QP (C platforms) / RP (D platforms).
CFG = F_P (12+1+15+0). Buck0/HP0 (PPVDD_ANE_AWAKESW), Buck1/LP0 (PPVDD_ANE_SRAM_AWAKESW), Buck2/HP1 (PPVDD_APR_CS_S1). OTP = UP.
Main charger IC. Multi-FET input stage (Q5216 SS3H3K15AFS, Q5265, Q5270 DMN32D2LFB4). Converts USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON. ARKANOID debug connector (J5150) on battery page.
Produces PP5V_S2 (VOUT=5.15V, f=1.5MHz, EDC=3.0A). Startup typ=6.4ms. Input from PPBUS_AON. Enable: P5VS2TPS_PWR_EN. Power good: P5VS2SN_PGOOD. Discharge via QC280.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Left port 0 (rear). CD3217 with SPI ROM. Manages CC signaling, PD negotiation, VBUS switching. Internal LDOs: PP1V5_UPC0_LDO_CORE, PP3V3_UPC0_LDO.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Left port 1 (front). Same architecture as ATC0.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC2
ics.description: Right port. Different designator prefix (UG vs UF) from left ports.
Handles HDMI 2.1 output. HDMI connector JH500 (RCPT-HDMI-C-BLK-X1502).
Controls SD card slot.
Two instances: SSD0 Ocarina (page 107) and SSD1 Ocarina (page 112). Each drives 4 NAND S5E packages.
MagSafe connector. APN: MLB:516S00787, Flex:516S00788. Q5401 MOSFET pair. Configured as UPC5 (16 pin size).
Eos Secure Element IC. SN300V wired mode SE only. DS303891/DS117A6.
Mini-LED backlight driver. Fed from PPBUS_AON. Output: PPVOUT_LUXE.
Carlow B0 silicon audio codec. Fed by PP3V8_CODEC_VP (VP supply), PP1V2_CODEC_VL_VD.
Controls EDP_PANEL_3V0_EN and EDP_PANEL_DISCHARGE. Feeds UP730 (3V29 to backlight) and UP701 (3V8 to MDB). PP3V8_AON input.
Willamette WiFi 6E + BT module. 2GFEM, 5GFEM antenna front-end modules. Fed by PPVBAT_AON_WLBT and PP3V8_AON_WLBT.
